label: Ritual outcome comp (building of any def present)
description: Applies qualityOffset when at least one building from the specified list is found in the ritual gathering area.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset applied when any building from defs is present.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.

defs.label: Defs
defs.description: List of ThingDefs; the comp applies if any one of these buildings is present in the ritual area.
